steps.title: Use the past time marker
steps.content: The phrase by the end of the 1990s points to a completed moment in the past. The verb must show that the doubling was already complete by that past point.

steps.title: Reject wrong tenses
steps.content: Choice A uses present perfect, which does not fit a specific past time marker. Choice C uses present tense, and Choice D uses future tense. The past perfect form shows completion before the past reference point. The answer is B.
